subject: Fermi  trigger No 695057654: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB230110.65 (trigger No 695057654,13h 46m 16.08s , +42d 46m 58.8s, R=5.62) errorbox  64 sec after notice time and 100 sec after trigger time at 2023-01-10 15:35:49 UT, with upper limit up to  17.2 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 73 deg. The sun  altitude  is -55.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 71 deg., longitude l = 90 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2191006

We obtain a following upper limits.
